# PikaCSS

> Atomic CSS-in-JS Engine

Write styles in JS objects. Ship zero-runtime atomic CSS.

## Table of Contents

### Getting Started

- [What is PikaCSS](/getting-started/what-is-pikacss.md): An overview of PikaCSS, the instant on-demand atomic CSS-in-JS engine.
- [Setup](/getting-started/setup.md): Install PikaCSS and configure your build tool to start using atomic CSS-in-JS.
- [Usage](/getting-started/usage.md): Learn how to write styles with pika() and see common usage patterns.
- [Engine Config](/getting-started/engine-config.md): Complete reference for all PikaCSS engine configuration options.
- [ESLint Config](/getting-started/eslint-config.md): Set up ESLint rules to enforce static pika() arguments in your project.

### Integrations

- [Unplugin](/integrations/unplugin.md): Configure PikaCSS with any bundler using the universal unplugin integration.
- [Nuxt](/integrations/nuxt.md): Zero-config PikaCSS integration for Nuxt applications.
- [Agent Skills](/integrations/agent-skills.md): AI-assisted development skill for using and extending PikaCSS.

### Customizations

- [Layers](/customizations/layers.md): Control CSS cascade ordering with @layer declarations in PikaCSS.
- [Important](/customizations/important.md): Make all generated atomic CSS declarations use !important.
- [Preflights](/customizations/preflights.md): Inject base CSS styles before utility classes in PikaCSS.
- [Variables](/customizations/variables.md): Define CSS custom properties (variables) in PikaCSS engine configuration.
- [Keyframes](/customizations/keyframes.md): Define CSS @keyframes animations in PikaCSS engine configuration.
- [Selectors](/customizations/selectors.md): Define custom selector mappings for concise nested style definitions.
- [Shortcuts](/customizations/shortcuts.md): Define reusable style aliases that expand to full style definitions.
- [Autocomplete](/customizations/autocomplete.md): Customize IDE autocomplete suggestions for PikaCSS properties and values.

### Official Plugins

- [Reset](/official-plugins/reset.md): Inject community CSS reset stylesheets as preflight using the reset plugin.
- [Typography](/official-plugins/typography.md): Semantic prose styling for long-form content with the typography plugin.
- [Icons](/official-plugins/icons.md): Resolve icon shortcut classes via Iconify with the icons plugin.
- [Fonts](/official-plugins/fonts.md): Manage web font loading with provider abstraction using the fonts plugin.

### Plugin Development

- [Create a Plugin](/plugin-development/create-a-plugin.md): Learn how to create a PikaCSS engine plugin with defineEnginePlugin.
- [Available Hooks](/plugin-development/available-hooks.md): Complete reference of PikaCSS engine plugin lifecycle hooks.
- [Type Augmentation](/plugin-development/type-augmentation.md): Extend PikaCSS TypeScript interfaces with module augmentation.
- [Define Helpers](/plugin-development/define-helpers.md): Define helpers for type-safe PikaCSS configuration and plugin authoring.

### API Reference

- [API Reference](/api.md): Overview of all PikaCSS package APIs and exports.
- [Core API reference](/api/core.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/core from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Integration API reference](/api/integration.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/integration from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Unplugin API reference](/api/unplugin.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/unplugin-pikacss from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Nuxt API reference](/api/nuxt.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/nuxt-pikacss from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Plugin Reset API reference](/api/plugin-reset.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/plugin-reset from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Plugin Icons API reference](/api/plugin-icons.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/plugin-icons from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Plugin Fonts API reference](/api/plugin-fonts.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/plugin-fonts from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [Plugin Typography API reference](/api/plugin-typography.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/plugin-typography from exported surface and JSDoc.
- [ESLint Config API reference](/api/eslint-config.md): Generated API reference for @pikacss/eslint-config from exported surface and JSDoc.

### Troubleshooting

- [FAQ](/troubleshooting/faq.md): Frequently asked questions and troubleshooting tips for PikaCSS.
